raw:
## Completed
Implemented AskUserQuestion note-model update:
- Removed whole-question notes from state, focus modes, UI, result shape, and hint text.
- Preserved per-choice notes.
- Added always-present `Custom answer:` option with pure custom selection logic and tests.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/logic.ts` - added custom answer pure helpers; removed whole-question note model.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` - updated TUI rendering/input handling for inline custom answers; removed question-note UI.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh` - expanded unit coverage for custom answers and note removal.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh`

## Notes
Verification passed locally. Unrelated working-tree changes existed and were left untouched.
